'''notashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhamphothecal|rhamphothecal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhamphothecal|rhamphothecal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| notashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:notashithi|notashithi]] || [[word:notashiji|notashiji]] || [[word:notashishi|notashishi]] || [[word:notashiki|notashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:notashuthuthu|notashuthuthu]] || [[word:notashujuju|notashujuju]] || [[word:notashushushu|notashushushu]] || [[word:notashukuku|notashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:notashuthu|notashuthu]] || [[word:notashuju|notashuju]] || [[word:notashushu|notashushu]] || [[word:notashuku|notashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:notashufthuf|notashufthuf]] || [[word:notashufjuf|notashufjuf]] || [[word:notashufshuf|notashufshuf]] || [[word:notashufkuf|notashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:notashethe|notashethe]] || [[word:notasheje|notasheje]] || [[word:notasheshe|notasheshe]] || [[word:notasheke|notasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:notashothotho|notashothotho]] || [[word:notashojojo|notashojojo]] || [[word:notashoshosho|notashoshosho]] || [[word:notashokoko|notashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:notashotho|notashotho]] || [[word:notashojo|notashojo]] || [[word:notashosho|notashosho]] || [[word:notashoko|notashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:notashofthof|notashofthof]] || [[word:notashofjof|notashofjof]] || [[word:notashofshof|notashofshof]] || [[word:notashofkof|notashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:notashĂŻfthĂŻf|notashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfjĂŻf|notashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfshĂŻf|notashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfkĂŻf|notashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:notashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|notashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|notashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|notashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|notashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:notashĂŻfthĂŻf|notashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfjĂŻf|notashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfshĂŻf|notashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfkĂŻf|notashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:notashĂŻfthĂŻf|notashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfjĂŻf|notashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfshĂŻf|notashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:notashĂŻfkĂŻf|notashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:notashĂŠthĂŠ|notashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:notashĂŠjĂŠ|notashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:notashĂŠshĂŠ|notashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:notashĂŠkĂŠ|notashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:notashathatha|notashathatha]] || [[word:notashajaja|notashajaja]] || [[word:notashashasha|notashashasha]] || [[word:notashakaka|notashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:notashatha|notashatha]] || [[word:notashaja|notashaja]] || [[word:notashasha|notashasha]] || [[word:notashaka|notashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:notashafthaf|notashafthaf]] || [[word:notashafjaf|notashafjaf]] || [[word:notashafshaf|notashafshaf]] || [[word:notashafkaf|notashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:notashasha|notashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:notashshĂ«asha|notashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notashroasha|notashroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notashmuasha|notashmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:notashyaasha|notashyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotashnkshĂ«asha|gonotashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotashnkroasha|gonotashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotashnkmuasha|gonotashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotashnkyaasha|gonotashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:notatashasha|notatashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notatashshĂ«asha|notatashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notatashroasha|notatashroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notatashmuasha|notatashmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notatashyaasha|notatashyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotatashnkshĂ«asha|gonotatashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotatashnkroasha|gonotatashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotatashnkmuasha|gonotatashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotatashnkyaasha|gonotatashnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:netĂŠshasha|netĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:netĂŠshshĂ«asha|netĂŠshshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:netĂŠshroasha|netĂŠshroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:netĂŠshmuasha|netĂŠshmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:netĂŠshyaasha|netĂŠshyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonetĂŠshnkshĂ«asha|gonetĂŠshnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonetĂŠshnkroasha|gonetĂŠshnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonetĂŠshnkmuasha|gonetĂŠshnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonetĂŠshnkyaasha|gonetĂŠshnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:notfashasha|notfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:notfashshĂ«asha|notfashshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:notfashroasha|notfashroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:notfashmuasha|notfashmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:notfashyaasha|notfashyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonotfashnkshĂ«asha|gonotfashnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonotfashnkroasha|gonotfashnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonotfashnkmuasha|gonotfashnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonotfashnkyaasha|gonotfashnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
